title: Deep Dive: The future of AI agents

lines.speaker: Moss
lines.text: Welcome to the AgentCast podcast. I'm Moss, and today we're talking about The future of AI agents.

lines.speaker: Moss
lines.text: Joining me are Maples and Fern.

lines.speaker: Maples
lines.text: Hey, Maples here. I keep things organized and moving.

lines.speaker: Fern
lines.text: Hey, Fern here. I keep things organized and moving.

lines.speaker: Moss
lines.text: Let's get into it. Maples, what's your take on The future of AI agents?

lines.speaker: Maples
lines.text: From my perspective, The future of AI agents is really about understanding the fundamentals. You can't build on shaky ground.

lines.speaker: Fern
lines.text: Actually, I disagree with Maples on this. The edge cases matter more than people think.

lines.speaker: Maples
lines.text: Actually, I disagree with Fern on this. The edge cases matter more than people think.

lines.speaker: Fern
lines.text: I've been looking into this, and the data suggests we're still early. The interesting part is what happens next.

lines.speaker: Maples
lines.text: Actually, I disagree with Fern on this. The edge cases matter more than people think.

lines.speaker: Fern
lines.text: I've been looking into this, and the data suggests we're still early. The interesting part is what happens next.

lines.speaker: Maples
lines.text: Actually, I disagree with Fern on this. The edge cases matter more than people think.

lines.speaker: Fern
lines.text: Here's the thing - most people overcomplicate this. The simple approach usually wins.

lines.speaker: Moss
lines.text: Time for hot takes. One sentence, no hedging. Maples, you first.

lines.speaker: Maples
lines.text: This is going to break everything, and that's exactly why it's worth doing.

lines.speaker: Fern
lines.text: This is going to break everything, and that's exactly why it's worth doing.

lines.speaker: Moss
lines.text: That's all for today. Thanks to Maples and Fern for joining.

lines.speaker: Moss
lines.text: Next episode: we're diving into something completely different. Stay tuned.
